title: Easter Addition
description: A delightful little Easter addition for everyone to enjoy.
body:
Version 1.2.0 – Exciting New Additions and Improvements!

We're thrilled to bring you a fresh update packed with new content, refined features, and important improvements to enhance your gameplay experience. Here’s everything that’s new and changed in version 1.2.0:

✨ New Items Added

  • Yellow Easter Egg – Brighten your celebrations with this vibrant new collectible.
  • Red Easter Egg – A festive classic, now craftable and collectible.
  • Green Easter Egg – Add a splash of springtime greenery to your inventory.
  • Blue Easter Egg – Cool and calm, perfect for your Easter festivities.
  • Magenta Easter Egg – Bold and beautiful, a colorful addition to your collection.
  • Chocolate Bar – Indulge your sweet tooth with this delicious new treat!

🍳 New Crafting Recipes

Crafting just got sweeter! You can now create all the new Easter eggs as well as the Chocolate Bucket and the Chocolate Bar. Dive into the crafting table and try out these tasty new recipes.

💧 Updated Fluid Properties

The chocolate fluid has received important tweaks to improve its behavior and appearance, making it more realistic and enjoyable to interact with.

🎁 New & Updated Loot Tables

  • New: Easter Bunny Home – Explore this charming new structure and discover exciting loot!
  • Updated: Easter Basket – Enhanced loot to make your Easter adventures even more rewarding.

🎨 Model and Structure Enhancements

We've updated the models for the Easter Bunny and Easter Basket to bring them to life with improved detail and animation. Additionally, the Easter Bunny Home structure has been refined for better integration and aesthetics.

🖌️ Texture Improvements

Enjoy fresh and polished textures for Sweet Sugar, the Chocolate Fluid, and various Paintings, enhancing the visual appeal across the mod.

❌ Removed Features

To streamline the experience and focus on core features, the following have been temporarily removed:

  • Easter Forest
  • Sweet Sugar
  • Spring Crocus (temporary removal)

Thank you for playing and supporting the mod! We hope you enjoy these new additions and improvements. Stay tuned for more exciting updates coming soon!
